prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, regenerate it as a photorealistic candid convenience-store checkout moment. Keep the same employee, uniform, counter setting, and blurred/anonymized face treatment, but change the action so the employee is facing forward and extending both hands to pass a bottled drink to a female customer. Add the customer only as an out-of-focus foreground figure on the right, seen from behind/side, partially blocking the frame. Make the composition feel like an unposed smartphone snapshot: imperfect framing, slight handheld motion blur, natural skin tones, camera noise, shallow depth of field, and realistic fluorescent convenience-store lighting. Keep the Korean convenience-store signage and cigarette display atmosphere in the background, with the POS screen and barcode scanner visible near the counter.
